build.beforeBuildCommand: node scripts/gen-waiting-pages.mjs && node scripts/deploy-plugins.mjs && node scripts/copy-waiting.mjs && pnpm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' plugin: 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' plugin: https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' asset: https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: plugin: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: blob: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; frame-src 'self'
